hero.title: Your Hotel. Your Platform. Your Rules.
hero.subtitle: Stop paying 25% commissions. Join the first booking platform owned by hoteliers, for hoteliers.

why.title: Why Change?
why.point1: Major platforms take up to 25% of every booking. That's your revenue, not theirs.
why.point2: They own the customer relationship. They set the rules. You just comply.
why.point3: You create the experience. They take the profit. It's time for a fairer deal.

how.title: A Better Way
how.point1: A platform built, governed, and owned by the hotels that use it.
how.point2: Target commission of ~10%. Fair, transparent, sustainable.
how.point3: Profits are redistributed to participating hoteliers. Your success is our success.

cta.title: Be Part of the Change
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of hoteliers building a fairer future. Start by telling us about your hotel.

survey.title: Quick Survey
survey.subtitle: Help us understand your needs. Takes less than 1 minute.
survey.q1: How satisfied are you with current booking platforms?
survey.q2: What commission % do you currently pay?
survey.q3Placeholder: Tell us what bothers you most...
survey.q4: How interested are you in an alternative platform? (1–10)
survey.q5: Would you join if it meant higher profits?
survey.thanksText: Your feedback is invaluable. Ready to submit your hotel?

hotel.title: Submit Your Hotel
hotel.subtitle: Tell us about your property. It only takes a minute.
hotel.name: Hotel Name
hotel.successText: Your hotel is now in our database. We'll review it shortly.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your hotelier account

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Building the future of hospitality, together.
vision.section1: Centralized booking platforms have created a system where hoteliers pay excessive commissions, lose control of their customer relationships, and have no say in how the platform operates. This model is unsustainable.
vision.section2: A collectively-owned booking platform where every participating hotelier is a stakeholder. Lower commissions, shared governance, and fair revenue distribution.
vision.step5: Earn from bookings AND platform profits

footer.tagline: The booking platform owned by hoteliers.
footer.rights: © 2026 A Bed For Me. All rights reserved.
